narrative.headline: Engine reports lead a small set of 2022 Camaro owner complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed only 12 complaints to NHTSA for the 2022 Camaro, so the sample is small. Engine is the most reported area at 33%, followed by air bags and power train (17% each), then tires and the fuel/propulsion system (8% each). Almost all reports are about reliability rather than safety; the one exception is an air bag complaint tied to a crash. No fires, injuries, or deaths were reported in any category.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: The most reported area: 4 reports (33% of all complaints). No crashes, fires, injuries, or deaths reported.
